ambiences.title: Forest Rain
ambiences.description: Surrender to the gentle percussion of rain on ancient leaves. This soundscape wraps you in the quiet intelligence of a forest breathing — each drop a whisper, each moment a return to stillness.

ambiences.title: Ocean Waves
ambiences.description: Let the ancient rhythm of the sea dissolve tension from your body. Ocean waves carry millions of years of wisdom — each cycle drawing you deeper into restorative rest.

ambiences.title: Deep Space
ambiences.description: Enter the infinite silence between stars. Space is not empty — it hums with cosmic frequencies that expand consciousness and dissolve the noise of ordinary thinking.

ambiences.title: Mountain Wind
ambiences.description: Feel the clarity of high-altitude winds cutting through mental fog. Mountain air carries an elemental freshness that resets your nervous system and awakens your senses.

ambiences.title: Night Crickets
ambiences.description: The ancient lullaby of crickets has accompanied human sleep for millennia. This biophilic chorus synchronizes your brainwaves to the slow pulse of a summer night.

ambiences.title: Tibetan Bowls
ambiences.description: Centuries-old resonance healing meets modern mindfulness. Each harmonic overtone from these sacred bowls dissolves mental chatter and guides you into present-moment awareness.
